full_text:
Wen Chou 文醜
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wen Chou (文醜). A fierce general in service under Yuan Shao. Killed in battle with Cao Cao. Wen Chou was affiliated with Yuan Shao. Wen Chou lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
